transcript.text:
Hello, everyone
So for today
(Convenience store food series!!!) I brought lunch boxes and convenience store foods
It's called the ‘Happy Creator Campaign’
where all of you have to do is
leave one comment on this video, and each comment
will deliver one lunch box to malnourished children
It’s a heartwarming campaign
Please participate by leaving your comments!
I actually just held an event on May 5th
where I gave a bunch of prizes to kids
and also gave them lunch boxes
The kids were so cute!
(Children's Day on May 5th)
Tzuyang handed out all the lunch boxes
Originally she said

(The event was scheduled to be held at the food market) that she’d come to the food market and do it
(Umbrella / Why is it raining on Children's Day) But the event got canceled
(Tzuyang separately prepared lunch boxes..!) So she prepared this many lunch boxes
(2,300 lunch boxes for the kids!) Apparently, she gave over 4,000 lunch boxes
(Lunch boxes for kids filled with Tzuyang's kind heart)
(A huge nutritious lunch box!)
With the profit from ‘Garden Bunsik’
I decided to buy bikes for the kids
(Damn it, you rain...) But unfortunately, it's raining today
(Sohyang Hall, Sosa Eoulmadang, Bucheon City, Gyeonggi Province)
(Meet up with Tzuyang - Autograph session & lunch sharing)
(The children gathering for today's event)
(Tzuyang and Beoman Social Welfare Center's Children's Day event begins!)
We’re glad to have you here, Ms. Tzuyang
(I'm also honored to be here..!) We're grateful for you to be able to join
(Tzuyang enters the stage)

(Nice to meet you, everyone!) Hello, I'm Tzuyang, a mukbang creator
(We're happy to meet you, too!)
(Although all plans got canceled due to the rain...) I know it’s very disappointing
but Children's Day comes back next year
(Hope you have a happy day!) I hope you have a great time today
Thank you!
(A prize draw drawn by Tzuyang!)
(A bunch of prizes that kids will love)
(If she picks the number that you received in advance, you win!)
(First number) No.21!
(Hehe) (Congratulations!)
(The children look so happy)
(Wow!!!)
(The sound of children's happy laughter)
(Peace sign)
(And up next..!)

(An autograph session to get closer to the children!)
(Children will cherish good memories)
(And Tzuyang will receive snacks...heh)
(A really cute, self-proclaimed cutie) I get that a lot actually
Oh, that you’re cute?
(Self-proclaimed cutie) I’m so happy
I watch her videos in the morning
and even at night
(Thanks for watching every day, sweetie!) I feel really happy when I watch it!
(Children's Day event coming to an end)
(Donation ceremony)
(Distributed plenty of lunch boxes for the kids)
I got an autograph!
(You’re also very pretty) She's beautiful and has a kind heart, too
I love you, Tzuyang
It's not just here

We shared lunch boxes with another welfare center
and also with the local children's center
(For those who weren't able to attend today's event)
(Bucheon City, Gyeonggi Province)
(We reached out to other places in need)
If you comment on this video
for every comment, one malnourished child
will receive one lunch box
So we ask for your participation
Then, bon appétit!
(I look forward to your warm love!)
(Mukbang begins) The main dish today is this lunch box
So let's start with this one!
I prepared the electric pot
(Today's scapegoat) and the microwave here
Wow, looks delicious!

(Open)
(Got so many side dishes in there...) This is packed!
Microwave it for 2 minutes!
(Let's quench my thirst first)
This Coco Palm tasted so good
(Very generous) so I ordered a box of them!
(Extraordinary appetite...) These are the foods I have at home
(Only 1/5 of the whole...?!) I think that's about 1/5...
I'm really curious about this!
Cham Ramyun
(Yonsei Milk Cream Bread Matcha / brought the popular one) And this one is very popular nowadays
(Still warm)
The lunch boxes these days are so nice
(Bento with seasoned veggies and meat!) Ta-da!
Bon appétit!
(Meat side dish)

Delicious!
Garlic-marinated chicken nuggets?
(Very round!) The fried egg is so cool, can you see it?
(Second drink)
This is my favorite carbonated drink
Let's cook one ramyun too!
Cham Ramyun!
(Tearing up without hesitation) Let's tear this off
Microwaving cheddar cheese makes it even better
I should bring it
Gotta add cheddar cheese
(Squeezing to the last bit...) To the last bit!
There's beef bone broth inside!
(Why are you puzzled? LOLOL) I have to add even more broth?
There are diced ham and sausages
(Let's get to work)

The meat is delicious!
Fried kimchi pancake?
(Let me out first) I...
Hey
(Complete)
(Let's taste it)
(Don't fall!!!) Wait, wait! This is not strong enough
(Another rough day today...) I almost got into trouble
Oh, it tastes a lot like ham!
(I like it) Tastes good!
Sausages
This combo can't go wrong
This soup calls for rice!
(But Tzuyang...) Oh, my cheddar cheese!
(forgot about the cheddar cheese...) I forgot to add it in!
Should I try putting it in now?

I think this will taste like sausage stew, right?
Ah, and it sure does taste like one!!
(Cheese-coated, chewy noodles...!)
I'll have to eat the rest with rice later!
If you forgot to comment on this video,
please leave one, thanks!
(Suddenly dissing lunch boxes) I don't go well with lunch boxes
(Purely based on her own portion...) It's too small, so I have to eat slowly
(People usually don't eat that much...) But isn't every lunch box like that?
(People usually don't eat that much...) Like savoring to the last bite?
(First lunch box CLEAR!)
(Searching for the next food...)
Why's there nothing to eat?
(Red pepper tuna)
(The best pairing with rice...!) This tastes amazing with rice
(But why canned sea snails...?)

(Following her instincts) I ordered this too cuz I just wanted to eat it
Honestly, it doesn’t need seasoning, I can just eat like this
(Looks almost like an AI mukbang...)
(Disappeared)
Oh, hot, hot, hot
Ta-da!
(Got so many menus in there as well..) Oh, that looks delicious!
I thought it was like a tonkatsu set
but it has jeyukbokkeum* and Bulgogi *Spicy stir-fried pork
The quality is pretty good...
What sauce is this? Is it like tartar?
(The answer is chicken katsu!) I think it's made with chicken
When eating convenience store food,
doesn't it taste better with Coco Palm or Blue Hawaii?
(Forgot about it) Oh, red pepper tuna!
So delicious...

(Lives up to the taste) This is some great stuff
(Hehehe...) It feels like...
I'm eating properly...!
(Convenience stores' quality is increasing...) Their food is really nice these days
(Come on up) Triangular gimbap
My favorite, ham tuna mayo flavor...
This tastes different from regular tuna mayo
(Even smells different) It even smells nice!
(Perfect) That's a great pairing!
I wanted to try this
Shine Muscat Yogurt Jelly!
Delicious!
But it doesn't taste like yogurt at all
It only tastes like shine muscat!
(This one?) Shin ramyun?
(Or this one?) Tonkatsu ramyun?

(Just this one?) Shin ramyun?
What should I eat?
Tonkotsu ramyun?
Ta-da
(One more time...) To the last bit!
Let's try the soup first
Delicious!
It's good!!
It tastes like tonkotsu ramen
with a bunch of garlic
The smell of garlic is very strong!
Beef gochujang gimbap
This is packed with ingredients
This soup is amazing!
(Beef porridge)
(That's... small...??) Today's food is all small, but a great pairing!

(I'm tired already...)
(But...)
(I need to microwave the sausage...)
(Open)
The color is no different!
If porridge...
tastes bad or bland, I can add salt
(Recommended!!!) But it tastes way better with chicken stock! Especially for chicken porridge!
I haven't tasted it in a while, it's so good!
(The sausage is heated up)
It's very chewy
Oh, it's Chung 'Jung One'
(Park 'Jung One', 27 y/o) Me too
(The most used nickname back in the day...) My friends used to call me 'Chung Jung One'
It's so hot!
(Cooling down with Coco Palm)

Oh, that's refreshing!
Next up is Chapagetti mini cup!
I eat this every time I eat convenience store food
This is the mixed tuna triangular gimbap
I really like this one!
(All of a sudden?) I bought this one cuz I wanted to try it!
(So you do have a plan...) I also bought some cheese
I'll make corn cheese!
Place 2 pieces of cheese
(A bunch of cheese)
(Eating the Chapagetti while the corn cheese is being cooked) Looks delicious!
(Corn cheese is ready in no time!)
So amazing!
(Cheese that keeps stretching..)
Oh, that's hot
(Corn cheese lacking the last 2%) It'll taste better with mayo

It doesn't taste like the typical corn cheese
The corn and cheese tastes separately
I should call it maize cheese
(That's the same thing...) Wait...corn and maize...
It basically sounds the same
(Playful moment)
(Hmm...)
I've been thinking about why this tastes bad...
(If you know, please explain in the comments) Is it because of the string cheese?
(Last lunch box!)
(Can I take a break now..?)
(Gotta eat Shin ramyun if you're Korean!)
Wow, this soup is really delicious
(What about us...??) I'll have to buy a box of these
(A big buyer proportional to her appetite) I buy them in one box every time
Dried shredded squid

Gotta eat it with kimchi...!
(Ramyun and kimchi are like needles and threads..)
(Rice wrapped in seaweed!)
(She focused on eating for a long time...)
Actually, I was going to eat a sandwich earlier
(Pickles: Hello!) I made eye contact with this pickle
(Okay, bye..) I'll skip this one today!
Recently, I see a lot of the rare Pokémon bread
(Tzuyang's favorite) This is my favorite bread
(What kind of Pokémon will come out?) Let's open the sticker!
Ta-da, it's Blissey!
This is...
(The famous bread nowadays!) Yonsei Milk Cream Bread Matcha
This bread is very popular nowadays
(Gotta buy it if you see it) Apparently it went out of stock very fast
(+ Viyott*) *Yogurt w/ toppings

(Bread filled with cream..!!)
(Look at this amount of cream...!) It's filled up with cream!
This isn't the typical cream bread!
The matcha is so rich!!
(Now that's what I call... a ‘cream’ bread...)
(Disappears immediately)
(Enjoying the dessert to the fullest..)
Something tastes so refreshing!
(Viyott CLEAR!)
Twix!!
(For some reason, she looks so happy today)
There's chocolate cream inside
and chocolate bread
and even chocolate chunks
(The ultimate choco bread) This is some real chocolate for sure!
(Choco bread and chocolate milk...)

(Convenience store food ALL CLEAR!)
How many drinks did I have?
(A total of 10 drinks...!!)
As I've mentioned before...
I’m holding the ‘Happy Creator Campaign’
Each comment you leave
will provide a lunch box for malnourished children
So I ask for your participation!
Thanks for the meal today!
